# Super Handlers

> Premier forklift sales, rentals, repair and maintenance serving Brampton, Toronto, and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Ontario, Canada.

## About

Super Handlers is a forklift equipment company based in Brampton, Ontario. We specialize in forklift repair, maintenance, sales (new and pre-owned), and rentals. We serve businesses across the Greater Toronto Area including Brampton, Toronto, Mississauga, Vaughan, and Etobicoke. We carry all major brands: Toyota, Hyster, Yale, Crown, Raymond, and Nissan. We offer 24/7 emergency repair services.

## Contact

- Phone: 289-505-5696
- Email: superhandlers1@gmail.com
- Address: 241 Advance Blvd, Brampton, ON L6T 4J2, Canada
- Website: https://www.superhandlerslift.com

## Services

- Forklift repair and maintenance (all brands)
- New forklift sales
- Pre-owned / used forklift sales (inspected and certified)
- Forklift rentals (short-term and long-term)
- 24/7 emergency breakdown service
- Planned maintenance programs
- Genuine OEM parts supply

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM
- 24/7 emergency service available
